message:
beads: sync tracker with five newly-filed issues

Adds five issue records that were created locally but haven't yet
landed in the tracker JSONL. These pair with the upcoming Asupersync
networking migration and the safe-restart workflow:

  - ft-2h5wv        Refactor MuxPool (mux_pool.rs, 583 LOC) to the
                    Asupersync runtime. MuxPool is one of the last
                    Tokio-shaped components still in the mux path.
  - ft-xbnl0.2.4    Replace TCP/TLS/HTTP client + service boundaries
                    with native Asupersync networking. Finishes the
                    network-facing phase of the runtime migration.
  - wa-1igc         Safe-restart workflow — atomic
                    snapshot-restart-restore cycle so a user can
                    recycle an agent pane without losing terminal
                    scrollback or mission context.
  - wa-283h4.4      io_uring zero-copy mux I/O pipeline (formal
                    correctness + E2E). Part of the alien-artifact
                    uplift stream targeting mux I/O latency.
  - wa-nu4.3.9.5    Dogfooding + fixture capture for
                    compaction/usage/auth flows across all agent
                    types. Needed to lock down the robot-mode
                    expectations against real session recordings.

No code changes; only the tracker JSONL is updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
